items.title: Planning a World Cup Watch Party at a Bar? The ‘FIFA Police’ Are Lurking
items.summary: Some businesses advertising watch parties in Canada’s two host cities are wary of running afoul of FIFA’s copyright, which protects advertising “World Cup” events.
